prompt: A dramatic full-body photo of a woman dancing powerfully in a dark upscale lounge or bar, wearing a sleek black evening dress with a high slit and flowing velvet-like fabric that whips outward with her movement. She has long straight black hair flying to one side, a slim athletic figure, and small hoop earrings. Capture her in a confident, stylish dance pose with one arm raised gracefully above her head and the other curved downward, torso turned in profile, emphasizing elegance and motion. The setting is dim and cinematic with warm amber practical lights, soft bokeh, and a blurred audience in the background, including a few seated onlookers and a glowing television screen off to the left. The mood is cool, sensual, and high-end, with strong contrast, shallow depth of field, realistic skin, subtle motion in the dress hem, and fashion-editorial lighting. Photorealistic, dynamic nightlife photography, vertical composition.
